config.script:
'#include "50203" #include "50202" #include "50122" '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' ' generate_raport ' ' pSO - stream object ' '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- 'kontekst wykonania dostępny na każdym poziomie class CInternalRapCtxt public m_pRR 'CRawRaport public m_pSO 'output private m_pCurrRec private m_nCounterIter ' licznik znaczących rekordów private m_nRecordCount ' liczba rekordów zapytania private sub finish_section(byval nLevel) m_pRR.m_Sections(nLevel).end_section m_pSO end sub private sub begin_section(byval nLevel) m_pRR.m_Sections(nLevel).begin_section m_pSO, m_pCurrRec end sub private sub setwd_value(byval nLevel) dim wdfield : wdfield = m_pRR.m_Sections(nLevel).getwdfield() if wdfield <> -1 then m_pRR.m_Sections(nLevel).wdval = m_pCurrRec.fields(wdfield) end if end sub private sub write_row() dim iter for iter = 0 to m_pRR.m_SectionUB m_pRR.m_Sections(iter).process_row m_pSO,m_pCurrRec next end sub private function isend() isend = m_pCurrRec.EOF end function private sub next_row() m_pCurrRec.MoveNext end sub private function open() 'roboczo, lub gdy będziemy chcieli podłączyć się "żywcem" do jakiejś 'bazy 'dim adoConn : set adoConn = CreateObject("ADODB.Connection") 'adoConn.Open "navo_firma","sa","" 'set m_pCurrRec = CreateObject("ADODB.Recordset") 'm_pCurrRec.Open m_pRR.m_strADOQuery, adoConn set m_pCurrRec = trans_.createadors(m_pRR.m_strADOQuery) open = not isend() if not isend() then m_nCounterIter = clng(0) end if ' wyznacz liczbę wyników w raporcie m_nRecordCount = m_pCurrRec.RecordCount 'if m_pRR.m_strADOQueryPartFrom<>"" then ' dim strControlQuery: strControlQuery = "SELECT count(*) FROM " + m_pRR.m_strADOQueryPartFrom ' if m_pRR.m_strADOQueryPartJoin<>"" then strControlQuery = strControlQuery + " " + m_pRR.m_strADOQueryPartJoin ' if m_pRR.m_strADOQueryPartWhere<>"" then strControlQuery = strControlQuery + " WHERE " + m_pRR.m_strADOQueryPartWhere ' ' dim oAdoCountRec: set oAdoCountRec = trans_.createadors(strControlQuery) ' oAdoCountRec.MoveFirst ' if not oAdoCountRec.EOF then ' m_nRecordCount = clng(oAdoCountRec.fields(clng(0))) ' end if 'end if end function private sub begin_raport_data() dim iter for iter = 0 to m_pRR.m_SectionUB setwd_value iter begin_section iter next end sub private sub finish_raport_data() dim iter for iter = m_pRR.m_SectionUB to 0 step -1 finish_section iter next end sub private sub process_row() dim iter for iter = 0 to m_pRR.m_SectionUB dim wdfield : wdfield = m_pRR.m_Sections(iter).getwdfield() if wdfield <> -1 then dim strCurrRecVal: strCurrRecVal="" dim strSectionsVal: strSectionsVal="" if (not isNull(m_pCurrRec.fields(wdfield).value)) then strCurrRecVal=CStr(m_pCurrRec.fields(wdfield).value) end if if (not isNull(m_pRR.m_Sections(iter).wdval)) then strSectionsVal=CStr(m_pRR.m_Sections(iter).wdval) end if if (strCurrRecVal <> strSectionsVal) then 'detected change 'finish all from iter to m_watchdogUB dim iter2 for iter2 = m_pRR.m_SectionUB to iter step -1 finish_section iter2 setwd_value iter2 next 'begin new sections for iter2 = iter to m_pRR.m_SectionUB begin_section iter2 next end if end if next write_row end sub public sub perform() dim oPerf: set oPerf = doc_.performing("Generowanie raportu...") 'put header info 'open cursor if open() then begin_raport_data dim nGroupInterval: nGroupInterval = clng(100) dim nGroupInterval2: nGroupInterval2 = clng(2000) dim bCanGen: bCanGen = true ' czy wolno generowac dalej do while not isend() and bCanGen dim strMsg if m_nCounterIter = nGroupInterval then strMsg = "Raport zawiera już " + cstr(m_nCounterIter) if m_nRecordCount>0 then strMsg = strMsg + " z " + cstr(m_nRecordCount) end if strMsg = strMsg + " pozycji. Czy kontynuować generowanie?" ' ukryj na chwilę splasha set oPerf = nothing if MessageBoxAndForget(strMsg, "Generowanie raportu", vbYesNo, vbQuestion , USERPROF_REPORT_MOREDATA)<>vbYes then bCanGen = false else ' wyświetl ponownie splasha set oPerf = doc_.performing("Generowanie raportu...") end if end if if m_nCounterIter = nGroupInterval2 then strMsg = "Raport zawiera już " + cstr(m_nCounterIter) if m_nRecordCount>0 then strMsg = strMsg + " z " + cstr(m_nRecordCount) end if strMsg = strMsg + " pozycji. Czy kontynuować generowanie?" ' ukryj na chwilę splasha set oPerf = nothing if MessageBoxAndForget(strMsg, "Generowanie raportu", vbYesNo, vbQuestion , USERPROF_REPORT_MOREDATA_LEVEL2)<>vbYes then bCanGen = false else ' wyświetl ponownie splasha set oPerf = doc_.performing("Generowanie raportu...") end if end if if bCanGen then process_row next_row m_nCounterIter = m_nCounterIter + 1 end if loop finish_raport_data end if end sub end class function generate_raport(byref pSO,byref pRR) dim pRC : set pRC = new CInternalRapCtxt set pRC.m_pSO = pSO set pRC.m_pRR = pRR pRC.perform end function function show_raport(byref pRowRaport, byval bTable) dim pSO set pSO=doc_.createstreamobj() dim pm : set pm = doc_.getmodule(60120) pSO.write "" pSO.write "" + vbNewLine pSO.write "" + vbNewLine if (bTable) then pSO.write "" + vbNewLine pSO.write "" + vbNewLine end if pm.generate_raport pSO, pRowRaport if (bTable) then pSO.write "" + vbNewLine pSO.write "
" + vbNewLine end if pSO.write "" + vbNewLine pSO.write "" + vbNewLine dim pHli set pHli=doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE") set pHli.prop(GVAR_DESTPAGE)=pSO.getstream() show_raport=doc_.getpagehli(pHli).domodalauto() end function
